---
title: "Class17"
author: "Matthew Chan (A18130675)"
format: pdf
toc: true
---

## Background: Downstream analysis, use R and Bioc to explore the data set from the AWS computer. 


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tximport)

# setup the folder and file-names to read
folders <- dir(pattern="SRR21568*")
samples <- sub("_quant", "", folders)
files <- file.path( folders, "abundance.h5" )
names(files) <- samples

txi.kallisto <- tximport(files, type = "kallisto", txOut = TRUE)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
1 2 3 4 
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
head(txi.kallisto$counts)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
                SRR2156848 SRR2156849 SRR2156850 SRR2156851
ENST00000539570          0          0    0.00000          0
ENST00000576455          0          0    2.62037          0
ENST00000510508          0          0    0.00000          0
ENST00000474471          0          1    1.00000          0
ENST00000381700          0          0    0.00000          0
ENST00000445946          0          0    0.00000          0
```


:::
:::


# Transcripts for each sample

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
colSums(txi.kallisto$counts)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
SRR2156848 SRR2156849 SRR2156850 SRR2156851 
   2563611    2600800    2372309    2111474 
```


:::
:::


# Transcripts detected in at least one sample

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sum(rowSums(txi.kallisto$counts)>0)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 94561
```


:::
:::


# Filter

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
to.keep <- rowSums(txi.kallisto$counts) > 0
kset.nonzero <- txi.kallisto$counts[to.keep,]
```
:::


# No change over samples

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
keep2 <- apply(kset.nonzero,1,sd)>0
x <- kset.nonzero[keep2,]
```
:::


## PCA

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pca <- prcomp(t(x), scale=TRUE)
summary(pca)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Importance of components:
                            PC1      PC2      PC3   PC4
Standard deviation     183.6379 177.3605 171.3020 1e+00
Proportion of Variance   0.3568   0.3328   0.3104 1e-05
Cumulative Proportion    0.3568   0.6895   1.0000 1e+00
```


:::
:::


# Plot

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plot(pca$x[,1], pca$x[,2],
     col=c("blue","blue","red","red"),
     xlab="PC1", ylab="PC2", pch=16)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Class17_files/figure-pdf/unnamed-chunk-8-1.pdf){fig-pos='H'}
:::
:::


# ggplot

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

mycols <- c("blue","blue","red","red")

ggplot(pca$x) +
  aes(PC1, PC2, label=rownames(pca$x)) +
  geom_point( col=mycols ) +
  geom_text_repel( col=mycols ) +
  theme_bw()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Class17_files/figure-pdf/unnamed-chunk-9-1.pdf){fig-pos='H'}
:::
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
sampleTable <- data.frame(condition = factor(rep(c("control", "treatment"), each = 2)))
rownames(sampleTable) <- colnames(txi.kallisto$counts)

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(txi.kallisto,
                                sampleTable, 
                                ~condition)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
using counts and average transcript lengths from tximport
```


:::
:::




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
dds <- DESeq(dds)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
estimating size factors
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
using 'avgTxLength' from assays(dds), correcting for library size
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
estimating dispersions
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```

```


:::

